meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn about Roofpro — 25+ years of durable, reliable roofing, a team of licensed professionals, and the values that drive every project we deliver.

header.description: For over 25 years, Roofpro has protected homes and businesses across Miami with expert craftsmanship, honest service, fair pricing, and roofing solutions built to last.

values.description: The core principles that guide how we work, how we treat our clients and how we finish every single roof we touch: on time, on budget and built to last.

quality.title: Quality Craftsmanship
quality.description: Premium materials and meticulous workmanship on every job — no shortcuts, ever.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: Certified, insured crews that follow strict safety standards to protect your property and our team.

honest.title: Honest & Transparent
honest.description: Upfront, itemised pricing and straight answers — you always know exactly what you're getting.

community.title: Community Focused
community.description: We're proud to protect the homes and businesses of the neighbourhoods we live and work in.
